texto: There was clairvoyance to their words and a tenderness in their inflections that instilled even in the most cynical of male hearts that faith and fate weren’t just words, they were our guides and as long as you kept your heart open, sooner or later love would find its way into it.
explicacao: Citação de Eric Monsky sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “There was clairvoyance to their words and a tenderness in their inflections that instilled even i…” articula amor, fiction, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.

frase_original: There was clairvoyance to their words and a tenderness in their inflections that instilled even in the most cynical of male hearts that faith and fate weren’t just words, they were our guides and as long as you kept your heart open, sooner or later love would find its way into it.
